Sponsorships / PremiumBeat

PremiumBeat

music
Affiliate
30% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

PremiumBeat provides exclusive, high-quality tracks and sound effects for use in new and traditional media projects, including videos, films, apps, games, and television.

PremiumBeat Affiliate Program

PremiumBeat’s library of royalty-free music gives you a diverse collection of styles and genres to suit your visitor’s needs. They’ve assembled a team of the world’s leading composers for film, video, and media, coming from a range of backgrounds who’ve made their music available to you.

Program benefits

  • 30% commission when new customers make a purchase.
  • Receive regular and flexible automatic monthly payments via PayPal.
  • Track results via cookie-based affiliate tracking software which allows affiliates to be credited within 30 days after the first click.
  • Interact with dedicated in-house affiliate managers who will help optimize and improve your performance results and commissions.
← Back to All Sponsorships

Fairly Odd Streamers is a resource hub for livestreamers with curated sponsorships, tools, and insights.
